name: Broccoli-Rice Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to directions.
2. Combine rice, cheese, slightly beaten eggs, and salt in a bowl. Press the mixture firmly into a greased dish. Set aside.
3. Defrost broccoli in its package. Microwave for 4 minutes on High. Place broccoli in a 1-1/2 quart casserole dish; add onions to the broccoli. Microwave for 6 to 8 minutes on High, then let stand covered for 3 minutes.
4. Beat remaining egg slightly. Stir in milk, pepper, mushrooms, and remaining salt; add to broccoli mixture and mix well.
5. Spoon into prepared rice quiche shell. Microwave for 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese. If necessary, microwave an additional 20 seconds on High to melt the cheese. Makes 6 servings. Use a 10-inch quiche dish.
